oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Integrating on-call into your life
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: McCall, Melinda
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: There are a number of different ways veterinary practices handle on-call duties. Some split up the duties among all vet­erinarians in the practices, while others only offer emergency services to clients or don’t offer any emergency services at all. Veterinary medicine as an industry is starting to examine why veterinarians are leaving rural veterinary practice in the Unit­ed States, and one of the main reasons cited is emergency duty.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 154
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
